context.// domain config: hosted_zone_id is the Route 53 zone we delegated from Squarespace; domain_name is the FQDN the chat UI will live at. Both are needed for the Cognito + HTTPS setup. See agent README 'Setting up a domain and SSO' for how to provision the hosted zone.
context.// agent-runtime config: Values below are read by the Compute stack via self.node.try_get_context() and injected into the agent task's env. Override per-deploy with --context key=value, or pin account-specific values (role ARNs, S3 bucket URIs) in ~/.cdk.json so they don't end up in the repo.
